name: todos-ai
description: Vue.js + LangGraph.js + NestJS — Todos AI Agent

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "pnpm --filter backend dev" "pnpm --filter frontend dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter backend build && pnpm --filter frontend build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @todos/shared test && pnpm --filter backend test && pnpm --filter frontend test
